🍪

Cookies
for Cancer

Giving back to those who face the hardest challenges.

See Our Impact Learn More
❤️

Support St. Jude Children's Research Hospital

St. Jude is leading the fight to end childhood cancer. Your donation helps ensure no family ever pays for treatment.

Donate to St. Jude →
Our Mission

Baked with love,
served with purpose.

We're a community-driven initiative turning the simple joy of cookies into real, meaningful support for families navigating cancer treatment. We also raise money to provide scholarships for students battling cancer, helping them keep their future bright even through the hardest times. Every purchase, every donation, every share — it all adds up.

🫶

Community First

Built by neighbors, friends, and families who believe small acts create big change.

💰

100% Goes Further

Every dollar raised goes directly toward supporting families at St. Jude and beyond.

🎓

Scholarship Fund

We raise money to provide scholarships for students fighting cancer, so their education doesn't have to be another casualty of their diagnosis.

🍪 Cookies for Cancer

A grassroots initiative baking hope into every cookie. Together, we make a difference for children and families fighting cancer.

✉️ prilutskiy152@gmail.com 📞 551-502-4530
